1.name: Canard
1.address: 734 E Burnside St, Portland, OR 97214, USA
1.notes:
Walk-ins only, next to Le Pigeon, same chef. 

Claude: *...the foie gras dumplings and the famous "steam burger" are the signatures, and the duck stack breakfast is legendary if you happen to swing by during the day.*

1.name: kann
1.address: 548 SE Ash St, Portland, OR 97214, USA
1.notes:
Gregory Gourdet's Haitian wood-fire spot, James Beard "Best New Restaurant" winner.

They seem fully-booked until May 20!: [Resy reservation](https://resy.com/cities/portland-or/venues/kann?date=2026-05-15&seats=2)

1.name: Coquine
1.address: 6839 SE Belmont St, Portland, OR 97215, USA
1.notes: Can get a reservation, it's prix-fixe only and you have to pay ahead of time to reserve it.

1.name: L’ Orange
1.notes: A renovated house, kinda quirky, may be cool. NYT named it one of "America's best restaurants" in 2024.

1.name: Mucca Osteria
1.address: 1022 SW Morrison St, Portland, OR 97205, USA
1.notes: Old school cool Italian place, apparently been there a while. Also Prixe-fixe and must pay at booking.

1.name: Langbaan
1.address: 1818 NW 23rd Pl, Portland, OR  97210, United States
1.notes:
Booked: LangBaan for 2 on 05/15/26 Fri 8:15 PM.
Hi there, Langbaan here! 
Before joining us, please check out our 'What to know before you go' page at https://www.langbaanportland.com/opentable. Thank you!  
 See more: https://opentable.com/l/PetfJxZbI.

1.name: Han Oak
1.address: 511 NE 24th Ave, Portland, OR  97232, United States

notes.1:
I made a reservation at 8:15pm at Lang Baan. 

I couldn't get a reservation for this night at Le Pigeon. I'm on the **notify me** list, but doubtful I'll get one. Several other restaurant options below.... Claude likes Coquine as the best "not-Le Pigeon" option but it's a bit out of town.

title: Portland Puppy Pickup 🐶
itineraryNotes:
Our new puppy 🐶 is in Eugene and the breeder can meet us in Portland and we will make a mini-visit to Portland out of it.

TODO: Get puppy supplies beforehand?

From the breeder:
> The puppies are currently being fed Redbarn Ancient Grain Puppy Food – Lamb Recipe, which they are thriving on. You can find this food on Chewy here:
